title: Professional Communication for Electrical Engineering
outline: This course aims to develop an understanding of effective written communication for engineers. Students learn the requirements for written reports and correspondence in terms of planning, organisation and selection of information. There is a particular foc us on professional style and tone. In addition, the students consider their identities as engineering professionals, including the development of CVs and management of social media. Finally, there is a focus on academic writing, including referencing and style.
